scripts.test: pnpm test:frontend && pnpm test:contracts && pnpm test:data-integrity && pnpm test:capabilities && pnpm test:smoke && pnpm test:release
scripts.test:contracts: tsc --noEmit --project tests/contract/tsconfig.json && node scripts/validate-contract-fixtures.mjs && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --test contract_fixtures
scripts.test:data-integrity: tsc --noEmit --project tests/data-integrity/tsconfig.json && node scripts/validate-data-fixtures.mjs && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --test schema_data_fixtures
scripts.test:smoke: node scripts/validate-smoke-matrix.mjs && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --test smoke_scaffold
